use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and landing pages
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars and navigation
Loading state buttons during async operations
Multi-variant button system for different hierarchy levels
ai_summary: A versatile Button component system with multiple variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, warning), sizes (tiny to large), and shapes (square, circle, rounded). Supports icon prefixes/suffixes, loading states with spinner integration, disabled states, and full-width options. Built with Tailwind CSS using a clean, minimalist design approach with hover state transitions.
